title: Midnight Craving Australian Jelly Custard
description: A sweet and tangy dessert inspired by the Australian outback, featuring a glassy jelly and a hint of sazon. Perfect for late-night cravings.
instructions: Combine gelatin and 1/4 cup cold water in a small bowl; let sit for 5 minutes to soften.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together sugar, 1 cup water, and lime juice. Heat over medium heat, stirring until sugar dissolves.
Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove saucepan from heat and add softened gelatin; stir until dissolved.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg yolks and heavy cream. Temper egg yolks by slowly pouring warm jelly mixture into egg yolks, whisking constantly.
Return saucepan to medium heat and cook until mixture thickens, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and stir in sazon.
Strain mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a clean bowl. Allow to cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate until chilled and set, at least 2 hours.
Serve chilled, garnished with fresh lime zest if desired.
